purpose: Thin per-deposit INDEX into the recovered external metadata for this deposit's legacy Zenodo DOIs. The actual records live in the bulk data stores under data/ (openalex-severed-recovery.json, zenodo-xml-pretermination-2026-06-07.tar.gz, datacite-full-backup.json, datacite-survivors-multi-heteronym.json). Sidecars do not duplicate those records — they map each covered DOI to its identifier in each store.

openalex.lookup: records[].doi == this DOI; openalex_id is the W-prefixed OpenAlex Work ID

zenodo_bulk_xml.lookup: extract <record_id>.xml from the tarball where record_id is the digits after 'zenodo.'

datacite_survivor_sweep.lookup: search records[].attributes.doi == this DOI across orcid_records, name_records, sigil_records, vox_records, feist_records
